expectations.text: Queried the pipeline_run table for the specific UUID
expectations.evidence: Queried DB, found no pipeline_run record exists for the UUID

expectations.text: Searched CloudWatch logs for the pipeline run ID or related errors
expectations.evidence: Found complete timeline from 04:23:24 UTC - download through step 4 failure with IntegrityError

expectations.text: Listed S3 artifacts to see which pipeline steps completed
expectations.evidence: Listed S3 and found artifacts in 1-sources through 4-segments, noted missing 5-cropped+ folders

expectations.text: Identified the specific step or reason the pipeline failed
expectations.evidence: Correctly identified FK constraint violation at step 4 (cut) because pipeline_run record doesn't exist in DB

expectations.text: Provided a clear summary with actionable next steps or recommendations
expectations.evidence: Three recommendations: re-run via API, add fail-fast guard at step 1, investigate dispatch race condition
